title: Logical Efficient Tools
description: Allows almost every block to be mined faster using a certain tool
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hkYY1SfL/images/dcde1427dfa6bd5f8d46ac364ec36249b14b70a5.gif)

<hr width="25%" />

Certain blocks, most notably glass, glowstone, honeycomb blocks and froglights, don't have tools associated to them. This means that they are always broken at the same speed, no matter what tool you are using, which can get tedious when trying to remove a large amount of them at once.

This data pack aims to fix this by giving every one of those blocks an associated tool, excluding blocks that aren't meant to be broken, like reinforced deepslate, trial spawners and vaults, as well as blocks that are always instantly broken, like honey blocks and blocks of resin.

<details>
<summary>A full list of what blocks can be broken using which tools :</summary>


<details>
<summary>~~ Pickaxe-Efficient Blocks ~~</summary>
  
- Glass
- Glass panes
- All stained glass colors
- All stained glass pane colors
- Tinted glass
- Beacons
- Glowstone
- Sea lanterns
- Redstone lamps
- Levers
- Frosted ice
- Dragon eggs (if you can manage to mine it, at least...)
- Turtle eggs
- Sniffer eggs
</details>

<details>
<summary>~~ Axe-Efficient Blocks ~~</summary>
  
- All bed colors
- Skeleton skulls
- Wither skeleton skulls
- Player heads
- Zombie heads
- Creeper heads
- Piglin heads
- Dragon heads
</details>

<details>
<summary>~~ Shovel-Efficient Blocks ~~</summary>
  
- Powder snow
- Cakes
- All candle cake colors
</details>

<details>
<summary>~~ Hoe-Efficient Blocks ~~</summary>
  
- Cacti
- Honeycomb blocks
- Ochre froglights
- Verdant froglights
- Pearlescent froglights
</details>

<details>
<summary>~~ Shear-Efficient Blocks ~~</summary>
  
- All carpet colors
</details>
</details>
